text: RT @AdamLowisz: Grok 4.3 is next level. I've been using it quite a bit for everything.

Cursor 的设计模式还挺好用的。

但是有个细节问题，当我 "Plan New Idea"，如果提示词使用的中文，那么生成的设计文档最好也是中文。现在每次我中文提示词，设计文档都是英文。

简单来说，设计文档语言默认应该和提示词语言一致。

cc @ryolu_ https://t.co/ebrfSo6dIh

RT @godofprompt: "Every complaint about Claude is secretly a workflow confession."

A FAANG engineer posted this on Reddit. 1,100 upvotes.…

Claude Code just shipped /goal.

You set a condition. Claude keeps working across turns until it's met. No babysitting. No prompting each step.

A separate AI checks the work after every turn. Not Claude judging itself.

Set it. Walk away. Come back to finished work.

I made a https://t.co/Kzpew512pA

@StitchHQ is building an operating system for modern financial institutions, starting in the Middle East. Its API-first platform enables banks, fintechs, and non-financial https://t.co/jR9uFkdWhr

0.8.0-beta版本我们干了件事——把整个核心重写了🛠

之前 Open Design 跟 Figma 一样，是个你得"打开"的 app。现在不用了。它是 headless 的，可以直接活在你已经在用的 agent 里——Claude Code、Codex、你自己的 IM 都行。
